title: erodium cicutarium var. commixtum
intro: Erodium cicutarium var. commixtum, also known as red-stemmed geranium or heron's bill, is a variety of the geranium plant that belongs to the geranium family (Geraniaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Erodium cicutarium var. commixtum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including gastrointestinal issues and respiratory problems.
